name: Collapsible
description: Salt Core Collapsible enables content to be collapsed (hidden) or expanded (visible) with a single trigger button. It consists of three sub-components: Collapsible (container/state manager), CollapsibleTrigger (button wrapper), and CollapsiblePanel (content container).

Collapsible.description: Root container managing open/closed state. Provides context to CollapsibleTrigger and CollapsiblePanel children.

props.open: Whether the collapsible is open (controlled). Use with onOpenChange for controlled state.
props.defaultOpen: Whether the collapsible is open by default (uncontrolled). Defaults to false.
props.onOpenChange: Callback fired when open state changes. Signature: (event: SyntheticEvent<HTMLButtonElement>, open: boolean) => void
props.children: ReactNode. Should contain CollapsibleTrigger and CollapsiblePanel components.

CollapsibleTrigger.description: Wraps a button or other interactive element to control open/closed state. Auto-applies aria-expanded and aria-controls attributes.

props.children: Button or interactive element to be wrapped. Receives aria-expanded and aria-controls props automatically.
props.className: Optional CSS class to apply to the trigger wrapper.
props.onClick: Optional click handler. Signature: (event: MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement>) => void

CollapsiblePanel.description: Content container that shows/hides based on open state. Auto-applies aria-hidden and hidden attributes.

props.id: Optional ID. If not provided, one will be auto-generated. Used for aria-controls relationship with trigger.
props.className: Optional CSS class to apply to the panel container.

accessibility.role: button (trigger), varies (panel is a div container)
keyboard: Tab — If focus is above the trigger, focus moves to the trigger
Shift+Tab — If focus is below the trigger, focus moves to the trigger
Enter or Space — Expands or collapses the panel
aria: aria-expanded — Auto-applied to trigger; reflects open/closed state
aria-controls — Auto-applied to trigger; points to panel ID for screen reader association
aria-hidden — Auto-applied to panel when closed; true when open=false, removed when open=true
hidden attribute — Auto-applied to panel when closed for DOM visibility control

with: Button — Commonly wrapped by CollapsibleTrigger as the interactive element
Card — Can wrap collapsible content sections within cards
StackLayout — For organizing collapsible sections vertically
inside: VerticalNavigation — Collapsible submenus in navigation trees
Dialog — Collapsible sections within modal content
FormField — Collapsible sections for complex form layouts
